name: royal-spades
description: Local LAN party Spades — TV table view + phone controllers

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.party: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
